text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Ahh…… What a beautiful starry sky…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…It feels as if I am being tucked in by 
the sound of waves and the embrace 
of the night.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: …I wonder, are you feeling the same way?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…It's about time for me to get started 
on my "journey" soon.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…I'm sure the route I take 
will be different to yours.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: While I don't know what is awaiting me…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to enjoy this to the fullest, 
following wherever my heart takes me.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
If by chance I discover "new gold" at the end 
of my journey… I'll come find you again.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: I'm sure there will be plenty of tales to tell.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Alright, guess I'll be going. 
To where it all begins ——

The challenge of the Twinkle Series awaited 
me and Stay Gold. Three whole years we 
would be spending together.
…Well, that was the plan anyway.

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text:
It appears that Stay Gold has 
yet to sign the contract.

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text:
As the registration procedures require a 
formal contract, I would urge you to have 
it signed as soon as possible, but…

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text:
…I understand that you are not sure 
of Stay Gold's current location.

At this moment, the director's secretary, 
Tazuna, is inquiring about when I could 
submit my contract with Stay Gold.

…My bond with Stay Gold was born 
after we met at a certain destination.

Stay Gold is a horsegirl that has displayed 
a genuine potential in racing. Moreover…

A unique circumstance of hers is that she 
holds the memories of a "Stay Gold" from 
another world.

Through this peculiarity, I was able to catch 
a glimpse of the striking hoofprints left by this 
girl from another world.

This cemented the fact that her "memories" 
were real and genuine events that happened 
in another world.

In order to go on "A Journey to Destroy all 
Pasts", Stay Gold and I have joined forces, 
which is reflected through this contract.

All of which is for the sake of Stay Gold 
embarking on more interesting journeys, 
and for us to enjoy this together.
…However, she has yet to sign the contract.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Alrighty, I'm going to head off. I'll leave 
you to get the preparations for my debut 
done before I get back.

As Stay Gold said those words, she headed 
off on a small trip to rest before her debut. To 
think that this would become an issue today!

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text:
I understand the situation now. 
I will also request an extension for ——
—— Oh～, there you are, there you are.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Yo. I kept you waiting.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I got souvenirs～ You see this little 
wooden bear? It's got a bone necklace 
that wards off evil! I also got some scent 
bags that smell interesting ——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Hm? Ah～ that's right, that's right.

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text:
—— I can confirm the contract has now been 
signed. Please leave the document with me.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Man～, my bad my bad. I didn't expect 
they needed my signature.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: So? Is that all you needed from me?

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text: Mhm. The signature was the last part of the procedure. Now that it is all complete, I can rest easy as well…!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Alright. Since this is now case closed…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: I think I'll go for a little run. It's been a while.

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text:
Uhm, I do want to explain the process that 
comes after signing the contract…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Aah, I'll leave that stuff to you.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: —— Well then, see you later～

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text: Ah, excuse me, Stay Gold…!

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text: Off she goes…
choice_data_list: She really marches at her own pace…

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text: …Even so, that girl picked you as her trainer.

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text:
That's something to be delighted about. 
While I feel the road will become challenging 
from here on out…… I bid you all the best!

After listening to Tazuna's explanation, 
I turned into the training grounds, 
looking for Stay Gold…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Fuuuuu!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Haha……!

There she was, happily running on the track. 
Her figure cutting vigorously through the 
wind, while petite, looked keen and full 
of strength.
choice_data_list: (I knew it, her aptitude is crazy…!)

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Fuu……! Running on the track really feels amazing～

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Oh, you made it. Aaalrighty, then its time for—

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Nah, it's time for food.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Alright. Let's eat here today～
choice_data_list: T-To think we'd go outside the academy…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
It's easier to see ahead if you pick a spot 
with a good view. Plus the food is yummy. 
No downsides at all.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Fuu～ That was good, that was good.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…Though speaking of the future, have we 
decided what destination our journey's 
compass will be pointing towards?
choice_data_list: …To "A New Journey to Destroy all Pasts".
…To "A New Journey to Destroy all Pasts".

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Exactly.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…The me in the other world was able to 
seize their One and Only Gold at the end of 
their journey.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
That dazzling memory, even now, remains 
within me as an unfading radiance…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…but in the end, the Gold my otherworldly 
self found belongs only to them.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
It's not something that belongs to me 
who exists right here, right now.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: ……You see, I want to find it.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
On this "New Journey to Destroy all Pasts" 
we're about to embark on. At its destination…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: …I'll find my "New Gold".

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Gold that is mine and mine only.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
And you're my travel companion who's 
coming along on this journey with me.
choice_data_list: …Where do you think we'll end up?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I wonder now. We'll just have to keep 
going forward to find out.

I don't know where our final destination 
would be, but I do know how we should 
proceed.

What's important is that we destroy all 
past journeys. In other words, it means 
to leave hoofprints different to the girl 
in the other world.

If she is to find her "New Gold", then there's 
a clear target to aim for…
choice_data_list: Let's aim to compete in the classics.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: ……Ooh.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
My other self indeed ran in the Kikuka Sho. 
…Well, even being generous, they didn't 
exactly perform all that well.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
First thing I should try is to rewrite 
that result, huh?
choice_data_list: Not at all. We're entering the Satsuki Sho!

text_block_list.text:
The Classics. That is something only the 
greatest horsegirls in their classic year can 
challenge, a stage of tradition and glory.

Amongst these, there is a group of three 
races: the Satsuki Sho, the Japan Derby, 
and the Kikuka Sho. Together known as 
the Classic Triple Crown…

If she can run and win the Classic Triple 
Crown races, then she will have unmistakably 
left a completely new set of hoofprints 
compared to the girl in the other world.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
So it all starts from the Satsuki Sho. 
You're right, it is the first priority to 
destroy these "memories".

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Even so…… Heheh…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
It's not like I have even debuted yet, and 
we're talking about all these great things 
like the Classics.
choice_data_list: I think it's more interesting this way.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Haha! That's for sure.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…Now that we have settled on that, 
could I ask you a favor?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. My habit of leaning towards the left. 
I want to fix that as soon as possible.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I've had quite a bit of issues with that. 
…If we're aiming for the classics, that is 
something I'll have to work on, right?
choice_data_list: Got it, leave it to me…!
Got it, leave it to me…!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Nice, you're rearing to go. I need you that 
way if we're going to be on the same journey.

…Just like that, with our goal and hurdles 
all set, the preparations to begin our journey 
are complete.

I wonder where this free-spirited girl's 
journey will take us.

I will watch over her. …And we will 
enjoy this experience together.

With renewed determination, my journey with 
Stay Gold had begun.
